title: Tithymalus trapezoidalis
taxonomy: Tithymalus trapezoidalis is classified within the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is a type of spurge, a genus that includes over 60 species of flowering plants. The classification of Tithymalus trapezoidalis is further broken down into the order Malpighiales, and the class Magnoliopsida. As a member of the Euphorbiaceae family, Tithymalus trapezoidalis is closely related to other plants such as Euphorbia and Phyllanthus. The exact classification of Tithymalus trapezoidalis may also be represented using binomial nomenclature.
